---
title: Data wrangling - The New Sound of Politics
authors:
  - name: Robert Bowien
    affiliation: University College Dublin
    roles: writing
    corresponding: true
bibliography: references.bib
---


```{r}

```

```{r}

gles_data <- haven::read_dta("new-sound-of-politics/data/ZA6832_v2-0-0.dta")

gles_korresp <- readxl::read_xlsx("new-sound-of-politics/data/ZA6832_v2-0-0_Korrespondenzliste.xlsx")


```

```{r}
nrow(gles_data_stata)
nrow(gles_korresp)

# gles_subset <- gles_korresp[grepl("Pol. Mediennutzun", gles_korresp$Variablenlabel),]

gles_data$m0001_1


info_source_data <- gles_data |> subset(select = c("field_start", "field_end", "version", "m0001_2", "m0001_3")) # m0001_1 does not yet include social media, social media in there since 2012



summary(info_source_data)

```
